title: GEEPAS Electric Insect Killer Powerful UV Fly Zapper for Flies, Moth, Mosquitoes & Wasps For Indoor Use | 70m² Coverage | Removable Washable Tray | Chemical-Free Pest Control | Bug Catcher, 30W
bullet_points: ✅ POWERFUL 30W UV FLY ZAPPER – This high-performance bug zapper features 2 x 15W UV tubes that effectively attract and eliminate flies, mosquitoes, wasps, and other flying insects within seconds. Ideal for home, kitchen, office & restaurants.

✅ WIDE 70M² COVERAGE & REPLACEABLE BULBS – The ultraviolet light attracts insects from up to 70M² away, ensuring maximum pest control. The replaceable UV tubes provide long-term performance, keeping your space insect-free.
✅ CHEMICAL-FREE & ODOURLESS INSECT CONTROL –This eco-friendly fly killer operates without chemicals, making it safe for homes with children, pets, and allergy sufferers.

✅ WALL-MOUNTABLE OR FREE-STANDING DESIGN – Designed for versatile use, this lightweight bug zapper can be hung on a wall (chain included) or placed on a flat surface, providing flexible positioning for maximum effectiveness.

✅ SAFE & EASY TO CLEAN WITH REMOVABLE TRAY – The protective safety grid prevents accidental contact, while the removable and washable insect collection tray ensures hassle-free cleaning and maintenance. The electric grid is self-cleaning for added convenience.
